scripts.validate: yarn format:check && yarn typecheck && yarn lint
scripts.genicon:macos: magick -background "#3a3a3a"  public/icon.svg -resize 128x128 public/icon-128x128.png && magick -background "#3a3a3a"  public/icon.svg -resize 120x120 public/icon-120x120.png && magick -background "#3a3a3a"  public/icon.svg -resize 152x152 public/icon-152x152.png && magick -background "#3a3a3a"  public/icon.svg -resize 167x167 public/icon-167x167.png && magick -background "#3a3a3a"  public/icon.svg -resize 180x180 public/icon-180x180.png && magick -background "#3a3a3a"  public/icon.svg -resize 16x16 public/icon-16x16.png && magick -background "#3a3a3a"  public/icon.svg -resize 48x48 public/icon-48x48.png
